title: Materiality finding body (v1)
description: The `body` of the §8.2 response envelope emitted on the non-quiet output port — the shape a host validates as `response.body` for both a `finding` and an `abstain` (spec 10.2). The chip-authored assessment rides here; cited source spans live on the sibling `response.evidence` field as taint-preserving quoted_span structures, kept structurally separate from the assessment (spec 8.2), and are not carried in the body. `lineageKey` echoes the originating signal's lineage.

lineageKey.description: Passthrough of the originating §8.1 signal lineage key.

sourceUrl.description: Canonical source URL of the assessed publication.

reason.description: Present on an abstain body, e.g. 'insufficient-evidence'.

assessment.description: Chip/gateway-authored claim (finding only). Not a verbatim source span; may be a taint-marked value when derived from hostile model output.
